title: Refund and cancellation policy
content: You can cancel your CloudDash subscription at any time from the Billing page. We offer a full refund if you cancel within 14 days of your initial purchase or an annual renewal. We do not provide partial month refunds for mid-cycle cancellations. If you experience an unexpected spike in overage charges due to a misconfiguration, please contact support within 7 days of the invoice date to request a one-time courtesy waiver. Refund disputes exceeding $500 are handled by our billing escalation team and may take up to 3 business days to resolve. This section provides additional context to ensure comprehensive documentation. The CloudDash platform is built with robustness and scalability in mind. When encountering issues, always verify your configuration settings and ensure that your network allows communication with our endpoints. If you continue to experience difficulties, please consult the troubleshooting steps outlined previously. Our support team is available to assist you with any advanced configurations or unexpected behavior. Remember to keep your agent versions up to date to benefit from the latest features and security patches. Furthermore, monitoring your usage limits can prevent unexpected service interruptions. For detailed API specifications, refer to our developer portal. We are committed to providing reliable service and continuous improvements to our platform. Should you have any feedback or feature requests, do not hesitate to reach out. Thank you for choosing CloudDash as your monitoring solution. We hope this guide has been helpful in resolving your query.
